verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The sun, it will never go down, in that city, The sun, it will never go down; The flowers are blooming forever, And the sun, it will never go down.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I feel like traveling on, I do, I feel like traveling on; The flowers are blooming forever, And the sun, it will never go down.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If feel like shouting, sometimes I do, I feel like shouting, I do; The flowers are blooming forever, And the sun, it will never go down.
